Attack cards deal 2 additional damage.
Skill cards gain 2 less Block.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FRIGHT_EXPRESSION_POWER:
Skill cards gain 3 additional Block.
Attack cards deal 2 less damage.
Attack cards deal 1 additional damage and apply 1 Vulnerable.
Skill cards gain 3 less Block.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SMUG_EXPRESSION_POWER.d:
The first time each turn you play a card, draw 1 card.
Attack damage taken is increased by 1.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-AGGRIEVED_EXPRESSION_PO:
The first time each turn you gain Block, gain 4 more Block.
Attack cards deal 3 less damage.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-STUBBORN_HIT_POWER.desc: The first time each turn you take attack damage while Smug, gain 1 Strength.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-ROLLING_DEFENSE_LINE_PO: The first time each turn you enter an expression, gain 2 Block; if it is Fright or Aggrieved, gain 4 instead.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTION_KALEIDOSCOPE_PO: The first time each combat you enter each expression, draw 1 card.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-HUNDRED_FACES_POWER.des: The first time each turn you enter an expression you have not entered this combat, gain 1 Energy.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-OUT_OF_CONTROL_SHOW_POW: Whenever you randomly enter an expression, gain 1 Strength.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FACE_MASTER_POWER.title: Face Master
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FACE_MASTER_POWER.descr: Random expression entries prefer expressions you have not entered this combat.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SOFT_REBOUND_POWER.desc: The next time you take attack damage, deal that much damage back.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BOUNCE_AWAY_POWER.title: Bounce Away
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BOUNCE_AWAY_POWER.descr: The next time you take attack damage, deal damage back equal to this amount.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BIG_REBOUND_POWER.title: Huge Rebound
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BIG_REBOUND_POWER.descr: This turn, whenever you take attack damage, deal that much damage back.
